would_pass_checks.basis: Red LED datasheet Vf at 10mA = 1.8-2.2V. Blocked: spice_model=LED_RED has no model source, so validation rejects the design with UNDEFINED_SPICE_MODEL (#55 fixed oracle-first; formerly the netlist compiled, ngspice exited non-zero, and the oracle silently downgraded to a DC-fallback 'passed'). Flips to outcome=pass when #60 supplies a real .model card.
